name: I'm in the water of a moat
description: I'm in the water of a moat
hints: You are in the enchanted moat water with a sleeping moat monster. Do not wake it!
SWIM DOWN to dive deeper. Be specific with directions. The moat is enchanted and may drag you under.
SWIM DOWN to reach the murky underwater area (room 17) where you can find a soggy towel. Do NOT just SWIM without direction - the enchanted water kills you.
notes: In the moat water with a sleeping moat monster. SWIM DOWN goes to the murky underwater area (room 17). SWIM without a direction in enchanted water drags you under and kills you. Do not wake the moat monster. Accessed by GO MOAT from the drawbridge (room 2).
